title: "the coroutine header requires -fcoroutines"
body:
## Error

I just updated to `Verilator 5.017 devel rev v5.014-242-gcf6e36297` from `Verilator 5.017 devel rev v5.014-161-g622f0c047` and started receiving an error that "the coroutine header requires -fcoroutines".

I didn't see any issues/PRs that address this, but I may have missed something.

I am getting my binary from OSS CAD Suite, so there is a chance their build scripts simply became outdated if there was some recent dependency change.

## System Info

```plain
Distributor ID: Ubuntu
Description:    Ubuntu 22.04.3 LTS
Release:        22.04
Codename:       jammy
```

## Test

```systemverilog
module tb;
    initial begin
        #1;
        $finish();
    end
endmodule
```
```bash
verilator --binary tb.sv
```
### Full Error
```plain

g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I./share/verilator/include -I./share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-overloaded-virtual -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable     -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT    -c -o verilated.o ./share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
```
